objective: Define the ML-DSA library boundary before implementing key generation, signing, and verification.

tests.name: rust_derivation_crate_gate
tests.expected_signal: No Rust crate is introduced until parameter, field, polynomial, encoding, rounding, vector, and constant-time gates are documented

tests.name: api_surface_fails_closed_until_implemented
tests.expected_signal: Signature operations throw NotImplemented rather than toy signatures

agent_notes: The Rust track is derivation-first and intentionally has no crate yet.
Production status is deferred until official vectors and side-channel review are complete.
